title: Admin control of users
excerpt:
Add more roles for users. For example: 

Normal User - Basic member usage
Manager - Admin usage, being able to add users, modify payment plans etc.
Administrator - Being able to control everything and login to other user…

posts.author: oliverjoonatan (Oliver Hotakainen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add more roles for users. For example:

  1. Normal User - Basic member usage
  2. Manager - Admin usage, being able to add users, modify payment plans etc.
  3. Administrator - Being able to control everything and login to other users without passwords etc. → Giving control of users automations, boards etc.
